problem.statement: Partner settlements and representative commissions require one auditable WLT-owned financial lifecycle backed by durable DSH operational evidence, versioned policies, deterministic calculation, explicit adjustments and read-only multi-surface readback.
problem.currentWorkaround: Settlement creation is derived from delivered orders and field commissions use one WLT policy, but order/captain commission amounts can still be caller supplied, settlement inputs do not retain cancellation/refund evidence, adjustments are not first-class, and representative surfaces expose fragmented read models.

actors.role: Authenticated partner viewing only its WLT settlement and commission references
Authenticated captain viewing only personal commission lifecycle and adjustment reasons
permittedActions: read own pending confirmed settled rejected and reversed states
forbiddenActions: confirm settle reject reverse or adjust a commission

actors.role: Authenticated field representative viewing only personal visit commission lifecycle
permittedActions: read policy-derived amount and adjustment reasons

actors.role: Authorized control-panel operator managing policies and governed financial lifecycle actions
permittedActions: create or update a versioned policy with reason
initiate a settlement from DSH evidence
confirm reject settle or reverse an eligible commission
forbiddenActions: supply settlement or commission truth amounts
approve an action created by the same actor where maker-checker applies
bypass mutation or service authentication gates

actors.role: Operational truth owner providing durable completion and cancellation evidence
permittedActions: deliver immutable order and visit evidence
forbiddenActions: calculate a WLT fee or commission

actors.role: Sole financial truth owner for policy application settlement commission wallet ledger adjustment and audit
forbiddenActions: reuse an idempotency key for different inputs

outcome.statement: Every settlement and commission is deterministically calculated by WLT from durable evidence and a retained policy version, every adjustment has a reason and balanced financial effect, and every required surface reads only canonical scoped references.
outcome.primaryMetric: verified evidence to canonical settlement or commission readback rate
guardrailMetrics: completed refund omitted from settlement count
outcome.baselineState: Delivered-order settlement and field visit commission foundations exist, but evidence retention, non-field policy calculation, first-class adjustments and complete multi-surface readback are incomplete.
outcome.targetState: WLT owns one evidence-backed idempotent settlement and commission lifecycle with policy versions, refund-aware calculation, adjustments, audit and scoped readback across partner captain field and control panel.
outcome.observationWindow: targeted static database contract backend frontend finance security runtime and independent review

criteria: DSH sends operational identities and immutable evidence only; it never sends a fee, net settlement amount or commission amount.
WLT verifies delivered or completed evidence, rejects cancelled evidence and applies completed WLT refund truth before settlement calculation.
A deterministic idempotency key cannot create two settlements or two commissions for the same evidence.
Every settlement and commission retains the exact policy version used for calculation.
Every non-field commission amount is calculated by an active WLT policy and never accepted from the caller.
Confirmation settlement rejection and reversal enforce legal source states and balanced wallet or ledger effects.
Every deduction or adjustment is signed, bounded, reasoned, operator-attributed and auditable.
Partner captain and field reads are actor-scoped and mutation-free.
Control-panel mutations require service authentication, explicit permissions, correlation and idempotency.
No runtime mock fixture local financial calculation or duplicate truth owner remains.
requiredChecks: targeted Go settlement and commission tests
DSH and WLT route registration tests
targeted TypeScript shared and surface typecheck

business: WLT exclusively owns settlement commission wallet ledger refund and adjustment truth.
DSH exclusively owns operational completion cancellation order store visit and representative evidence.
Every financial mutation carries service authentication correlation and idempotency.
Every visible success is read back from WLT.
Every policy change and adjustment is append-only auditable.
negative: No DSH or frontend code calculates settlement fees or commission amounts.
No caller supplied monetary value becomes commission truth.
No completed refund remains in the payable settlement basis.
No cancelled or unverified source is settled.
No idempotency key represents different inputs.
No actor reads another actor financial detail.

owners.productManager: DSH and WLT Financial Product Management
owners.productOwner: Settlement and Commission Operations Product Owner

execution.appetite: Close JRN-036 code data contract lifecycle and surface gaps without moving financial truth out of WLT, deploying production or self-approving protected evidence.
fixedConstraints: Repository mode is REMOTE_ONLY on sambassam.
WLT remains the sole financial truth owner.
DSH provides durable operational evidence only.
No PR merge force push release production deployment or SaaS activation is authorized.
Independent product finance security QA release and risk approvals cannot be self-issued by engineering.
